text:
Okay. I’ll tell you a story.

Once upon a recent Tuesday, there was a cat. The cat was fluffy, with the softest fur. It liked to drink milk from the bottle and would often curl up in a cozy nook. This particular cat was named Whiskers.

One day as Whiskers was licking its paws clean, it heard a ruckus from the backyard. Curious, it sauntered out. Facing a curious family outside, Whiskers meowed innocently. The children approached with bicycles, giggling.

“Wow, he’s so soft!” exclaimed one.

“Yes! Get your picture with Whiskers!” another cheered.

The children pulled out their phones, snapping selfies. They petted Whiskers gently.

“What should we name him?” asked a little girl.

“I got it!” shouted her brother. “Snuggles!”

The family laughed as Whiskers flopped down, purring contentedly. They took turns taking
